types.label: Oracle
types.description: For yes/no questions with likelihood modifiers

types.label: Task
types.description: For general task resolution

types.label: Combat: Opening
types.description: Phase 1 — who has advantage; outcome affects your Tactical Maneuver

types.label: Combat: Tactical Maneuver
types.description: Phase 2 — set up the scene; outcome affects Attack and Counter rolls

types.label: Combat: Attack
types.description: Phase 3 — attempt your plan; outcome affects Resolution

types.label: Combat: Counter
types.description: Phase 4 — creature counters; you roll defense; outcome affects Resolution

types.label: Combat: Resolution
types.description: Phase 5 — final outcome and wound

types.label: Spellcasting
types.description: For spellcasting attempts

types.label: Harvesting
types.description: For harvesting resources

types.label: Crafting
types.description: For crafting items

types.label: Augmenting
types.description: For augmenting items

types.label: Salvaging
types.description: For salvaging materials

types.label: You Approach NPC
types.description: For interactions when you approach NPC

types.label: NPC Approaches You
types.description: For interactions when an NPC approaches you

types.label: Debt Collection
types.description: For collecting debts

types.label: Navigation
types.description: For navigation checks

types.label: Secrets
types.description: For discovering secrets. Uses base DC 15 (level 5) with likelihood modifier, like Oracle and Insights.

types.label: Tracking
types.description: For tracking targets, creatures, or people

types.label: Quest
types.description: For quest resolution rolls

types.label: Insights
types.description: For discovering insights (Subject/Modifier). Always uses level 5 (DC 15).

types.label: Yes/No
types.description: Roll 1d6 — even = Yes, odd = No. No DC, level, or likelihood.

combat opening.Fail, but: Hindered by 1, but the enemy is surprised
combat opening.Success, but: Ease by 1, but take a strain

combat maneuver.Fail, and: Your actions failed, and you are hindered by 1
combat maneuver.Fail, but: Your actions failed, but nothing bad happens
combat maneuver.Success, but: Your actions succeeded, but you are hindered by 1
combat maneuver.Success: Your actions succeed and the tags are applied universally
combat maneuver.Success, and: Your actions succeed and your next actions are eased by 1

combat strike.Fail, but:
Missed, but kept guard.
No Modifier
combat strike.Success, but:
Hit, but left an opening.
Hinder 1 step

combat counter.Fail, and:
Caught off guard, defenses shattered.
Hinder 2 steps
combat counter.Fail, but:
Forced to retreat, but kept your shield up.
No Modifier
combat counter.Success, but:
Blocked the blow, but the impact was jarring.
Hinder 1 step
combat counter.Success:
Perfect parry or dodge.
Ease 1 step
combat counter.Success, and:
Counter-parry creates a massive opening.
Ease 2 steps

spellcasting.Fail, and: Fail, and Roll on the Mishap table
spellcasting.Fail, but: The spell fails, but nothing backfires or goes wrong
spellcasting.Success, but: Success, but it backfires and hinders all rolls until the end of your next turn
spellcasting.Success: The spell goes off exactly as you expected
spellcasting.Success, and: Successfully cast the spell and it eases the next roll by 1

you approach npc.Fail, and: The NPC is insulted. Decrease permanent Disposition 1 step.
you approach npc.Fail, but: You don't get what you want, but you learn why (gain an Insight).
you approach npc.Success, but: You succeed, but the NPC's Attitude drops 1 step for the next interaction.
you approach npc.Success, and: You succeed and leave a lasting impression. Increase permanent Disposition 1 step.

npc approaches you.Fail, and: Caught Off Guard: You lose all leverage immediately.
npc approaches you.Fail, but: Damage Control: You are on the defensive, but you spot a weakness or a hidden detail—gain an Insight.
npc approaches you.Success, but: Tense Standoff: You hold your ground, but the effort is draining. Attitude drops 1 step as they grow frustrated by your resilience.
npc approaches you.Success: Poise: You handle the approach perfectly.
npc approaches you.Success, and: Total Control: You flip the script. Permanent Disposition increases 1 step.

debt collection.Fail, and: Collectors come knocking and they come looking for blood (Combat encounter)
debt collection.Fail, but: Collectors come knocking but are understanding
debt collection.Success, but: Collectors offer an alternative payment method -- do this for me, and I'll let you off (Negotiations)
debt collection.Success, and: Collectors are feeling generous. Instead of hindered by two wealth check, hinder your check at the end of the session by 1 to see if you clear your debt.

harvesting.Fail, and: You failed to harvest the item and destroyed the resource
harvesting.Fail, but: You failed to harvest the item but the node is intact
harvesting.Success, but: Successfully harvested the item but it made harvesting more difficult, your next harvest check is hindered by 1
harvesting.Success, and: Successfully harvested the item and your next harvest check is eased by 1

crafting.Fail, and: You failed to craft the item and you lose the materials
crafting.Fail, but: You failed to craft the item but you didn't lose any materials in the process
crafting.Success, but: Successfully crafted the item but it made crafting more difficult, your next craft check is hindered by 1
crafting.Success, and: Successfully crafted the item and your next craft check is eased by 1

augmenting.Fail, and: You failed to augment the item and you lose the raw material.
augmenting.Fail, but: You failed to augment the item but you didn't lose any materials in the process
augmenting.Success, but: Successfully augmented the item but it made augmenting more difficult, your next augment check is hindered by 1
augmenting.Success, and: Successfully augmented the item and your next augment check is eased by 1

salvaging.Fail, and: You failed to salvage the item and destroyed it
salvaging.Fail, but: You failed to salvage the item but it was not damaged
salvaging.Success, but: Successfully salvaged the item but it made salvaging more difficult, your next salvage check is hindered by 1
salvaging.Success, and: Successfully salvaged the item and your next salvage check is eased by 1

navigation.Fail, and: You failed to navigate, and you are completely lost
navigation.Fail, but: You failed to navigate, but you've found an insight to point you in the right direction
navigation.Success, but: You successfully navigate, but you aren't sure you are going in the right direction
navigation.Success, and: You successfully navigate and find proof you are heading in the right direction

secrets.Fail, and: You find find and trigger a trap.
secrets.Fail, but: You find a trap, but it is not triggered
secrets.Success, but: You find a secret but its trapped

tracking.Fail, and: You lost the trail completely and have no idea where your target went
tracking.Fail, but: You lost the trail, but you've found an insight about where your target might be heading
tracking.Success, but: You're tracking your target, but you aren't sure if you're following the right trail
tracking.Success, and: You successfully track your target and find proof of their exact location or recent activity

quest.Fail, and: The goal is lost or ruined. You gain a permanent negative reputation tag in this region and the Countdown tally of a related quest fills by 2.
quest.Fail, but: You fail to achieve the goal, but you salvage an Insight or Resource from the wreckage. You cannot attempt this specific quest again for 1d4 sessions.
quest.Success, but: You achieve the goal, but at a high cost. You gain the reward, but you also take a Lingering Trauma wound or a new Flaw/Debt tag.
quest.Success: Clean victory. You gain the intended reward and 1 new positive tag related to your achievement.
quest.Success, and: Overwhelming success. You gain the reward, a new tag, and you may immediately clear one Countdown mark on a different active quest.

insights.Fail, and: No insight. And mark 1 Countdown tally on an active quest.
insights.Fail, but: No mechanical insight. But you gain a narrative detail (flavor/mood).
insights.Success, but: Found a Trace. Roll for Subject/Modifier. Mark 1 tally.
insights.Success: Found a Clear Lead. Roll for Subject/Modifier. Mark 2 tallies.
insights.Success, and: Found a Breakthrough. Roll for Subject/Modifier. Mark 3 tallies.
